requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: property address, zoning constraints, and residential project scope before selecting the residential building permit workflow
conditions: project is for residential building work in Portland
applicant has a property identifier or project address
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: before application preparation and permit type selection

evidence.quote: Review permit requirements, property information, and project scope before applying for a residential building permit.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: owner, applicant, and contractor responsibility information needed for the permit record
conditions: application will be submitted through DevHub or equivalent PP&D intake channel
work may be performed by owner or contractor

evidence.section: Apply for a residential building permit
evidence.quote: Provide applicant, owner, contractor, project site, and project description information with the permit request.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: completed residential building permit application information
conditions: residential building permit request is being prepared

evidence.quote: Submit a complete application with project information and required documents.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: building plans, site plan, structural details, and other drawings needed for residential plan review
conditions: project requires plan review
drawing plans are needed to describe proposed construction
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: with initial submittal and before plan review can proceed

evidence.quote: Plans must show the proposed work and include information needed to review the project.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: supporting calculations, reports, engineering, energy, and special documentation when applicable to the residential project
conditions: project scope triggers supporting document requirements
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: with initial submittal or when requested during review

evidence.quote: Additional calculations, forms, engineering, or reports may be required depending on the project.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: drawing plans as one searchable PDF when the Single PDF Process applies and supporting documents as separate PDFs
conditions: Single PDF Process applies to the residential permit submittal
plans are uploaded electronically

evidence.quote: Drawing plans are submitted as one searchable PDF; applications, calculations, and supporting documents are separate PDFs.

requirements.subject: permit technician
requirements.object: residential building permit submittal package for completeness before technical review
conditions: permit request has been submitted
uploaded documents are available for intake
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: after submission and before plan review routing

evidence.quote: Staff review the submittal for completeness before routing the plans for review.

requirements.subject: reviewer
requirements.object: residential building plans for applicable code and program requirements
conditions: submittal passes intake or prescreen completeness review
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: during plan review before approval or checksheet issuance

evidence.quote: Plans are reviewed by required review groups before a permit can be issued.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: checksheets, reviewer comments, corrected plans, and correction response materials
conditions: PP&D issues checksheets or requests corrections during plan review
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: after correction request and before plan review approval can continue

evidence.quote: If corrections are needed, respond to checksheets and upload corrected plans or documents.

requirements.subject: agent
requirements.object: official upload of corrected residential building permit plans or correction response documents
conditions: agent is assisting with a correction response
upload would become an official correction submission

evidence.quote: Use DevHub to upload correction materials when responding to plan review checksheets.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: required residential building inspections after permit issuance and before covering or completing regulated work
conditions: permit has been issued
construction reaches an inspection milestone
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: during construction at required inspection points

evidence.quote: Schedule required inspections for permitted work and receive approval before proceeding where required.

requirements.subject: agent
requirements.object: inspection scheduling request for a residential building permit
conditions: agent is asked to schedule or modify an inspection
the action affects the official permit record or inspection calendar
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: immediately before scheduling, rescheduling, or cancelling an inspection

evidence.quote: DevHub supports inspection scheduling for eligible online permits.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: residential building permit application and issued permit expiration status
conditions: application or permit remains inactive or work is not completed within applicable PP&D time limits
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: until permit is issued, extended, reactivated, completed, or expired under PP&D policy

evidence.quote: Applications and permits may expire if required steps are not completed within the allowed time.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: extension, renewal, or reactivation review for an eligible residential building permit record
conditions: permit or application is expired or near expiration
PP&D policy allows extension, renewal, or reactivation for the record state
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: before or after expiration only when allowed by PP&D policy

evidence.quote: Contact PP&D or use the available process to address expired permits or reactivation questions.

requirements.subject: agent
requirements.object: official submission of the residential building permit application
conditions: all required fields and documents appear complete
agent could press a submit or certify button in DevHub
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: immediately before official submission or certification

evidence.quote: Submit the permit request through DevHub after completing the required application steps.

requirements.subject: agent
requirements.object: fee payment or payment-detail entry for a residential building permit
conditions: DevHub or PP&D requests payment for intake, review, issuance, or permit fees
requirements.deadline_or_temporal_scope: immediately before payment or payment-detail entry

evidence.quote: DevHub can be used to pay permit fees when payment is due.
